faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to common questions about who we are and how we work.

whoWeAre.question: Who is Prime Global?
whoWeAre.answer: Prime Global is a Tunisian company based in Sousse, specialized in delivering integrated business support solutions with efficiency and professionalism.

servicesOffered.question: What services does Prime Global offer?
servicesOffered.answer: We offer four core services: business administration, logistics support, recruitment and talent acquisition, and operational optimization.

location.question: Where is Prime Global located?
location.answer: We are based in Sousse, Tunisia.

getStarted.question: How do I get started with Prime Global?
getStarted.answer: Reach out via WhatsApp, email, or the contact form on this site, and our team will follow up to understand your needs and how we can help.

industriesServed.question: Does Prime Global work with businesses outside Tunisia?
industriesServed.answer: We combine Tunisian expertise with a global standard of service. Get in touch to discuss your specific location and requirements.

contactMethods.question: How can I contact Prime Global?
contactMethods.answer: You can reach us by WhatsApp, email at info@primeglobal.tn, or through our website, primeglobal.tn.

contact.title: Let's Start a Conversation
contact.description: Reach out via WhatsApp, email, or the form below — our team will get back to you shortly.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.name: Full Name
form.successMessage: Thank you — your message has been sent. We'll be in touch soon.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or reach us on WhatsApp.

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters.

jobs.title: Current Job Listings
jobs.description: Use search and filters to discover relevant opportunities and review role expectations.
jobs.emptyState: No roles match your current filters. Please adjust criteria and try again.

search.label: Search roles
search.placeholder: Search by role, city, or country

siteSupervisor.title: Site Supervisor
siteSupervisor.summary: Lead multidisciplinary site execution teams while ensuring schedule integrity, safety compliance, and quality delivery.
responsibilities: Coordinate daily site activities with subcontractors and internal stakeholders.
Monitor execution quality, safety standards, and milestone completion.
Prepare concise progress updates and escalate operational risks early.
requirements: 5+ years of site supervision in complex construction programs.
Strong command of site HSE protocols and quality control processes.
Professional communication in English; Arabic is an advantage.

mechanicalEngineer.title: Mechanical Engineer
mechanicalEngineer.summary: Support engineering design, technical validation, and field coordination for mission-critical mechanical systems.
responsibilities: Review drawings, specifications, and installation sequencing plans.
Coordinate with procurement and site teams on technical requirements.
Contribute to testing, commissioning, and documentation packages.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent.
3+ years in mechanical systems delivery for industrial or infrastructure projects.
Proficiency in technical reporting and multidisciplinary coordination.

registeredNurse.title: Registered Nurse
registeredNurse.summary: Deliver compassionate, standards-led clinical care while coordinating with multidisciplinary teams in structured care environments.
responsibilities: Provide direct patient care aligned with established clinical protocols.
Maintain accurate patient records and treatment documentation.
Collaborate with physicians and support teams for continuity of care.
requirements: Recognized nursing qualification and active registration eligibility.
2+ years of practical nursing experience in hospital or clinical settings.
Strong interpersonal communication and patient-focused mindset.

logisticsCoordinator.title: Logistics Coordinator
logisticsCoordinator.summary: Coordinate shipment planning, vendor scheduling, and cross-border logistics communication to maintain delivery continuity.
responsibilities: Plan and monitor movement schedules for inbound and outbound cargo.
Coordinate with transport providers and customs stakeholders.
Track shipment performance and resolve delays proactively.
requirements: 3+ years in logistics operations or supply chain coordination.
Working knowledge of shipping documentation and routing controls.
High attention to detail and deadline-oriented execution.

frontendEngineer.title: Frontend Engineer
frontendEngineer.summary: Build performant, accessible web interfaces for enterprise workflows with a focus on quality, consistency, and maintainability.
responsibilities: Develop responsive UI components aligned with platform design standards.
Collaborate with backend and product teams on feature delivery.
Contribute to quality standards through testing and review discipline.
requirements: 4+ years of frontend development using modern TypeScript frameworks.
Strong understanding of accessibility and semantic web best practices.
Experience shipping production-grade interfaces in multilingual contexts.
